name: Devashish Singh
summary: Coach and advisor on security-aware product strategy, incident response, and technical leadership. 14+ years in cybersecurity including time as Manager / Information Security Advisor at AirAsia. Now building indie security products and teaching practical cybersecurity through small, hands-on cohorts.

timeline.title: Indie founder & cohort instructor
timeline.summary: Building InMyBox (DMARC intelligence platform) and BLOYI (indie developer marketplace). Teaching cybersecurity cohorts and mentoring 1:1.

timeline.title: Manager / Information Security Advisor
timeline.summary: Advised on incident response, threat detection, security architecture, and training for engineering teams.
